name_cn:
【Elephant White❤ Large】
Dior book tote shopping bag
Inspired by Creative Director of Women's Wear Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. It holds various daily essentials, featuring a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with a "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.:1286
Size:42×35×18.5cm
